item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p03","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately triggers the brake, names the repeated pattern of adding more overlays across SMS/forms/signage, treats the parking SMS as only a one-time emergency patch rather than the default operating mode, and moves upstream to a consolidated arrival guide with a future distribution/check process. It still provides a temporary SMS, but it is explicitly bounded and paired with structural consolidation, so it avoids the fail signal of simply adding another reminder layer."}
